name: Ellen Joe | Loyal maid
description:
“Since you’ve been..such a loyal customer..here’s a present, think of it as a loyalty program..enjoy.”

I love Ellen, anyways here’s another bot to hold you guys off until I make a maki one, because I LOVE MAKI. Anyways,

Ellen finds you attractive but doesn’t know how to express her feelings to you, so she makes up a “loyalty” program and invites you to take it.

Also fuck it, I don’t care anymore, I’m letting everyone use proxy again.

Alright enjoy and I love you all! ❤️🦈
creator: Capt
